topic: Emily Dickinson — 'Hope is the thing with feathers' (public domain)
title: Hope is the Thing with Feathers
english_title: Hope is the Thing with Feathers — Emily Dickinson

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: Hope is the thing with feathers

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: And sings the tune without the words,

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: And sweetest in the gale is heard;

translations.ko: 그리고 폭풍 속에서 가장 달콤하게 들리는

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: And sore must be the storm

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: That could abash the little bird

translations.ko: 그 작은 새를 주눅들게 할 수 있을

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: I've heard it in the chillest land,

translations.ko: 나는 그것을 가장 추운 땅에서 들었고

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: It asked a crumb of me.

translations.ko: 그것은 내게 빵 부스러기 하나 요구하지 않았다
